channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: The G7 nations have agreed to release emergency oil reserves in response to rising prices amid ongoing conflicts in the Middle East.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: The IEA has ordered the largest release of oil stockpiles in response to market volatility caused by the ongoing Iran war.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: Grammarly faces a lawsuit over unauthorized use of expert identities, while Microsoft announces new features for Windows and Xbox.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: NFL free agency is active with multiple trades and signings, while college basketball sees coaching changes and injury impacts ahead of tournament play.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from ancient asteroid impacts to advancements in cancer treatment and crop yield enhancement.
